name: Hannah
text: I went to this concentration camp with my school on 18 March and that was this lovely tour guide Tina she had an Australian accent in case there was two Tina’s  She was very direct and straight to the point and genuinely seemed interested in our answers and questions and didn’t drag things out. S...

name: montserrat vidal
text:
Hoy hemos estado en el campo de concentracion de Sachsenhausen.
No tenemos palabras para agradecer a Helena, guia que nos a sabido trasmitir todo lo que sucedio en este lugar con suma exquisitez, implicacion y profesionalidad, que a permitido amenizar una visita triste por su naturaleza ……. Mucha...

name: JERICCO WELLS
text: Tener la sensación que entras por las puertas y estás ahí dentro te remueve todo, una historia increíble y un lugar muy bien conservado

name: Amanda
text: A visita ao campo de concentração foi muito intensa e profunda, com uma experiência bem guiada e estruturada. É realmente emocionante e quem é mais sensível pode ficar extremamente emocionado. O lugar apresenta as informações de forma clara e impactante, permitindo compreender melhor o contexto h...

name: Himanshu Jindal
text:
A Chilling Reminder of What Humanity Must Never Become…

Visiting this concentration camp had been on my bucket list for a long time — and standing there in person was far more powerful and unsettling than anything I’d ever read or watched.

This place is a masterclass in deception, cruelty, and ...

name: Marie Yorke
text: The sad history behind this concentration camp is unreal and well worth a visit if you want to hear the true stories of what the Nazzis did to the Jews, in 1939 to 45.

name: Amy Spencer
text: A must see. If only to remember this can never be allowed to happen again

name: David Lopez
text: No conseguimos lo que queríamos nunca conseguí lo que buscamos

name: Veronica Savio
text:
Finalmente nos decidimos a ir sin tour, al llegar tienes la opción de audio-guía por 3,5€ por persona, la cual te va narrando un poco toda la historia del campo.
Hubiese preferido ir con guía, ya que se vive mejor la experiencia, pero no pudo ser!

name: Wan Lin Qin
text: The tour guide went above and beyond in telling us stories about the history, political climate and historical events around the Holocaust and how they echoe in today's world. You can tell he is truly well-read and passionate about justice and the meaning for sharing this difficult part of humani...

name: Gerard Oconnell
text: Tune your iPhone into it on Bluetooth free

name: Bengü Su
text:
It was a sad but educational experience,it is
better to come with a tour and a guide.

name: Alejandro Deulofeu Fleites
text: Amazing place and amazing experience with our tour guide, he has amazing knowledge and he is really passionated in sharing it with the crew; very interesting facts and very detailed information all the way.

name: Jude Weddell
text: We have all heard about the atrocities during WW11 ,but this place is a real awakening to just how cruel humans can be to other humans.   To see the actual showers where people were gassed and the ovens used to incinerate was shocking.   To read the stories of both the interred and 'staff' again ...

name: Ali T
text: Für Touristen leider nicht verständlich ich arbeite hier in der Nähe und werde öfter gefragt ob hier Sachsen Hausen wäre da die oranienburger Straße gleich neben an ist.. verwechseln leider viele Menschen

name: Mode Moreno
text: este lugar conmemorativo de las aberraciones que realizaron los nazis, ayuda a que no se olvide la historia, sobre todo que no se vuelva a repetir. No posee mucho material histórico, pero es un centro gratuito que te hace pasar el día de excursión. si tienes la Welcome Car Berlin zona ABC, y vas ...

name: Filipe Pires
text: Miguel is a fantastic guide with a real passion for 20th-century history, especially the events leading up to WWII. What I really liked was how he connected so many different parts of the story, giving us a broader understanding of how the world ended up on the path that led to the war and the at...

name: Ian Anker
text: Excellent tour and very informative.  Would definitely recommend!

name: RosTeK Vlog
text: There is no world's to descripe this place

name: Patricia Uiterwyk
text: Our tour was great from beginning to end. We were able to learn about historic events around WWII while commuting with no stress to the Sachsenhausen Memorial. Our guide (Miquel) was kind and informational. Compassionate and easy to understand, we really liked the way we were on time and kept at ...

name: Sandy Kerr
text: Amazing free museum. It is hard to describe by the nature of what this place is but it is well worth a visit very thought provoking it would be that it would be my most recommended thing to do whilst in the area.

name: SERGIO ADRIAN CHIODI
text: Muy bien preparado para tener conciencia de lo atroz que fue todo lo que allí se vivió

name: The Scottish Muncher
text: Tour guide was amazing, it was snowing & absolutely freezing when we were there, so it just shows, how cold & miserable it must have been for the poor victims, very informative & a must do if your ever in Berlin.

name: Katie Clarke
text:
It's definitely a place and tour you need to do while in Berlin.
The tour guide was very informative and knowledgeable.
Place was super busy, but due to the size, I was still able to see everything and learn about the tragic events, punishment, and killings that went on.
Really hits home and make...

name: Javier Arroyo Romero
text: Campo de concentración de Sachsenhausen. Muy duro. Pero hay que verlo, escuchar y sentir. Pelos de punta. Merece mucho la pena.

name: Yitsy Vivas Moreno
text: Debes tomarte un par de horas para visitarle

name: Dr. Zoidberg PhD.
text: Matias was our tour guide this afternoon. Excellent guide. I would 100% ask for his your if you're an English speaker. The weather was a little rough today, but he have us a lot of information and even helped us get back to the train station!

name: Edwin Luckers
text: Very interesting to see this horrible side of history. There are moments when you realize what people were capable of. I hope all will learn and remember these dark years and all can live in peace..

name: Karen Malone
text: Thanks so much Matias for a great tour and how  knowledgeable you are.  Would recommend this tour.

name: Russell Wood
text: It was an excellent tour. Our guide was Miguel. He has obviously spent years researching the history and shared it in an interesting way. I would definitely recommend.

name: andres felipe Chinchilla Ballesteros
text: Sad experience but it is good to know about this

name: andres felipe Chinchilla Ballesteros
text: The experience and sensation is hard to feel there, dificult to know about how the people were treated there.

name: Ralph Gonzalez
text: This was a great tour, included a quick lesson on public transportation in Berlin. We met our Guide, Miguel and thought what are the odds of running into a tour guide from Orange County. He was amazing and very knowledgeable. I highly recommend asking for Miguel as your tour guide.

name: DeAnn Martin
text: Our tour guide, Xavier, was excellent. He was knowledgeable & kind & went out of his way to include everyone in the conversation. He answered questions patiently. This tour is painful. You should leave feeling the weight of this awful time period & the loss of so many lives at the hands of evil. ...

name: justin dillon
text:
A very important site in history. Lewis was very knowledgeable and helpful with our group. Helped us get tickets for the train and had great directions for our journey after.
His knowledge of the site memorial and history made this worth the trip and we highly recommend it.
Hottest day of the yea...

name: Jasmine
text: This was extremely interesting

name: Chris R
text: Book this tour. You don’t want to miss out on this opportunity. We learned so much about Sachsenhauser concentration camp and the historical context of how it and the concentration camp system during the  Second World War came about and  why. Georgia , our guide, was great. She was so knowledgeab...

name: Shahnoor Begum
text: Very good experience with my children. Had lots of strawberries,they were really delicious...

name: Maggie Martinez
text:
Air of sadness as if time stood still.
A reallity check for me.

name: Mike Adelman
text: Canadian Chris was a superb tour guide!! He was so knowledgeable and passionate to share this tragic history of Sachsenhausen. He shared great detail and was incredibly responsive to our questions. The walk to the camp was incredibly impactful. He is an absolute value add to every tour he gives!!

name: Departure310526
title: A wonderful wander through history
text: From the start our guide provided a great experience. Although it was just the two of us she did not take any short cuts and delivered a most enjoyable visit. Our tour was well-paced and informative, covering all the key areas of the memorial with sensitivity and respect.

name: Carla Colunche
title: Incredible guide Sol
text: I love the guide Sol, super fun and good energy! The tour was informative and moving. Sol made sure everyone understood the historical context while keeping the group engaged throughout the entire visit.

name: Kayleigh Schmoock
title: Amazing guide and experience
text: The guide Sol is amazing, we had a lot of fun while learning about such an important part of history. The tour was very well organized and the guide was extremely knowledgeable.

name: Sarah Mitchell
title: Moving and educational experience
text: This tour exceeded our expectations. Our guide was incredibly knowledgeable and sensitive to the subject matter. We learned so much more than we would have on our own. Highly recommend booking with Be Original Tours.

name: TravellerJames42
title: Best historical tour in Berlin
text: We have done many tours across Europe but this was by far one of the most impactful. The guide brought the history to life with personal stories and detailed knowledge of the camp. A must-do when visiting Berlin.

name: Emma Rodrigues
title: Professional and respectful tour
text: The entire experience was handled with great professionalism and respect. Our guide took the time to answer all our questions and provided context that made the visit deeply meaningful. Well worth the time.

name: PatrickW_London
title: Very informative half-day trip
text: Spent the morning on this tour and it was very well organised. The guide was excellent and the pace was good. Only minor note is that the train journey is quite long, but the guide used that time to provide historical context which was great.

name: LisaK_Sydney
title: Essential Berlin experience
text: This tour should be on every Berlin visitor list. Our guide was passionate, well-informed, and handled the sensitive subject matter with care. The small group size made it feel personal. Cannot recommend enough.

name: Marco Bianchi
title: Toccante e ben organizzato
text: An incredibly well-organized tour. The guide spoke clearly and passionately about the history. The memorial itself is vast and having a guide made all the difference in understanding the significance of each area we visited.

name: AmandaT_Toronto
title: Thoughtful and thorough
text: Booked this tour for our family and it was handled perfectly. The guide adapted the content for our teenage children while keeping it factual and respectful. A powerful learning experience for all of us.
